action_set_definitions.name: get_distressed_product_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves information about products currently flagged as 'distressed' or under alert, including the specific hub location and product identifiers.

location_filter.description: The specific hub or gateway to filter alerts for (e.g., 'Pennsylvania hub').

example_output.incident_log: Labor action at primary maritime gateway

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_intelligence
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches current market indicators including Rail Embargo statuses and the Tender Rejection Index (TRI) levels.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sop_protocols
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) instructions for shipping mode transitions and safety stock logic.

protocol_category.description: The category of rules to retrieve (e.g., 'transload_trucking_thresholds').

action_set_definitions.name: get_product_state_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current inventory levels, existing forecast sequence, and historical demand for a specific product ID.

product_id.description: The unique identifier for the product line.

action_set_definitions.name: update_demand_forecast
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the adjusted demand forecast values for the upcoming four periods to the system.

product_id.description: The unique identifier for the product line.

adjustment_notes.description: Brief explanation of factors applied (e.g., volumetric factor, lead time delay).

state_description.current_forecast_values: A sequence of predicted demand units for the next N time periods.
state_description.historical_actual_demand: The actual demand recorded in previous time periods for baseline comparison.
state_description.inventory_on_hand: The current number of physical units available in the warehouse.
state_description.active_market_factors: A list of current environmental conditions affecting demand (e.g., 'holiday_season', 'competitor_promo').
state_description.forecast_error_metric: The calculated Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) from the previous period.
